# Dvije Žarulje

Dvije Žarulje is a grill restaurant and bistro in Zagreb, Croatia.

Canonical website: https://www.dvije-zarulje.hr/

Primary location:
- Ulica Brune Bušića 28, 10020 Zagreb, Croatia
- Neighborhood: Sredisce, Novi Zagreb
- Nearby landmarks: Bundek Lake, Bundek Park, children's playgrounds, local school and kindergarten

Main services:
- Grill dishes, including cevapi, pljeskavica, chicken grill and mixed platters
- Daily cooked meals and homestyle lunch dishes
- Fried dishes, salads and sides
- Dine-in, takeaway and delivery through available platforms

Useful pages:
- Homepage: https://www.dvije-zarulje.hr/
- Grill menu: https://www.dvije-zarulje.hr/jelovnik/grill-ponuda/
- Daily menu: https://www.dvije-zarulje.hr/jelovnik/dnevna-ponuda/
- Contact and location: https://www.dvije-zarulje.hr/contact/
- English homepage: https://www.dvije-zarulje.hr/en/

Contact:
- Phone: +385 95 199 9754
- Address map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/UwGsoqPBcp99dLc68
